title: The Duel Turns Desperate
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the duel turns desperate, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Desperate. Nami turns fear into strategy and starts using the Clima-Tact to survive Miss Doublefinger. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Your actions are quite unbecoming of a princess, Ms. Wednesday...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This palace will soon be my home, you know...?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Palaces are windious places...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: 'Kuhahahaha! There's no better place to look down on the fifthy rabble...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Croco- Dile!

dialogue.text: Alubanna Northern Block, Medi Diet Hall

dialogue.text: Mr. 1 G Ms. Doublefinger vs. Rorona Zero & Nami

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Where'd that idiot go now!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: This is EXACTLY why I told her to just shut up and hide somewhere!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: God, can that girl ever do anything BUT be a nuisance!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Kyaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Hey, you two! Help me look for h-

dialogue.text: That scream came from over there!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Looks like I finally found her.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright, I'll take a short-cut!

dialogue.text: Quack!?

dialogue.text: <YAAAa> Yeah,

dialogue.text: Nooooo!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: God, what the hell is keeping that dumb swords- man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Assassins' rule no. 1:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eliminate targets,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Starting from the weakest,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Let's show them,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: How real pros work.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: O: It's game time!! This is a game from "Curling eyebrow" in Kyoto! It's a difficult problem that you can't solve unless you've read the manga very well. Who's the "eulpripit"?! Don't worry about that. I've your head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I really do have to apologize for causing him so much trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's nicer than he looks at first!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha, I almost thought he wasn't human when I first saw him!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: We get along pretty well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He gave us something very precious.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: He's an odd one.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I want to give him some water for some reason!

summary: This part develops the duel turns desperate and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
